of data in this thing, like, you know, it's not going to be so useful anymore.

I think it's much easier to, like, react to something we've already written.
And then, yeah, go from there.
Yeah, so we can totally do that.
I'm not going to be writing the first draft of anything.
Like, you know, you have to, like, say, here's the first draft of this, and, like, it's going go live tomorrow.
Then I can make it better, but, like, don't expect me to write or send you anything.
And if you don't have anything, come up with something.
Yeah, I mean, that's exactly how we intend to work.
And then, last thing, and maybe just one minute, on the company account, did you have any kind of thoughts there already?
If not, we'll figure it out.
But just how you imagined kind of the company account persona playing with, like, you and the rest of the team.
And any inspirations as far as, like, oh, yeah, I like what these guys
I like what Clay does.
They have a good social game.
They engage with everybody.
The Clay handle is commenting everywhere.
That's really cool.
I think it should be always in relation to AI, not in relation to other companies' products, because there's a certain amount of care on this.
If we start thumbs up Clay posts, we're giving a signal.
everything in social media is signal, right?
So sometimes our internal teams are posting and they're commenting about other people's products.
I'm like, yeah, that sounds bad.
Like, that doesn't sound good.
Like, you know, like, yeah.
So about technologies, yeah, like Google launched a new AI.
That's awesome.
But like going and commenting on a potential competitor, like, don't like that.
Don't think that should happen.
Otherwise, like, you know, there's a lot of posts that involve us that we don't repost or reshare or...
Don't do anything with.
Maybe we started doing it, but like these ones, like if just search for Datagrid, like there's this post from five days ago, like this was a presentation I did at this huge company called DPR.
That's me and my top competitor.
She looks way better than me.
I'm just joking.
I killed her on this thing.
It was great.
But we didn't put us together.
They put us together on this presentation.
So, and like they had us both present, you know, and like it was really cool.
I mean, we had like a presentation.
was like six, like we didn't post, we didn't talk about it, we do anything.
Like in my opinion, like we're like not even like doing the basics to be engaged.
Like I don't even think we liked that post, which was about us.
So I want our team to.
You know, like, we shared this one, so that's good.
I mean, that's something.

But I want our team to be more – I want this thing to at least be reposting what we post and say, and then engaging on – like, for example, Miles just posted something about evals that our agent scored 16% in one of our benchmarks, and he was, like, so happy because, you know, the best AI score is 6%, whatever.
Like, this is an interesting post, but it's written in a way that it takes forever for me to actually parse, and I believe other people, too.

So would be nice if Datagrid went in here and commented, and, like, with Datagrid, like, you know, hey, thanks for the shout-out, whatever, like, something, like, funny and, like, humorous, you know, light, you know, like, I'm doing my best, but you haven't seen it, you know, whatever.
Like, something that's, like, engaging and light, and Datagrid is engaging with, like, the company.
Employees and engaging with other people and, like, you know, and so on and so forth.
So that's what I would like to try.
Cool.
Let's do it.
We'll just start working there and then we can iterate.
But at the very least, we'll have all these things.
I think we still have to figure out, like, what the persona of the company account is.
But we can have that as our topic for the next meeting after we post a bit.
Do you guys want access to our?
Yeah, yeah.
I didn't check if you added it to Assembly yet, but if you can, that would be great.
And then I don't know if you'd be comfortable adding us as, like, managers on your company account or at least adding Rof.
We haven't really figured out a great system for, like, always monitoring it.
But at least if you add us, we can try to figure that out.
Yeah.
Caitlin will do the, as you guys, managers and I'll.
Post something tomorrow.
saw you have queued a bunch of things.
You know, generally when I read something and it's really good, I'm like,  yeah.
So if it doesn't get approved quickly, it's because I'm like, eh, I don't know.
So, you know, we can talk about it, but like the reality is like that's the speed that I'll go on this.
Okay.
I guess we'll just make sure – we'll make sure there's a lot in there.
Yeah, yeah.
Well, I don't need volume, actually.
Like, I think I need like – we need just like unique ideas and like stuff that really – like the ones that do better are going to be like substance.
And yeah, we can – you know, I shouldn't be posting just for posting's sake.
Like I want to be – have a cadence of posting, but I think we can focus on like, you know, the essence of the core ideas.
The core ideas I want to share about is like building my business, overcoming challenges, AI, and the future.
You know, what's happening to people because of AI.
You know, one of the posts I want to make is, like, all roles we're not hiring because humans can't compete anymore.
And just, like, a laundry list of roles we'll never hire again in my company.
So, like, that could be interesting, you know, because it also impacts my customers.
Like, I'm not going to hire a content marketer ever again, ever.
Or you guys figure it out somehow on the AI, and I don't want ever to have to hire a human for that.
Yep, yep.
Cool.
I think – I mean, I know we're over.
I think we have enough.

I guess I just meant, like, we'll have enough there where there's always a post where it's not like we give you three for a week, and if you, like, don't have time to approve or give us comments, like, there's just nothing.
We want a bit of a buffer in there, but I think You put it in the calendar rather than ideas.
Because I saw there was nothing in the calendar.
I'm like, oh.
So it's all an idea.
So, like, please put it in the calendar so that I – because the way I look at it is in the inbox or something.
Like, there's one specific spot I go to.
Okay.
Well, I think we can pick a date.
Like, even if it's not approved, it'll still show up in the calendar.
And then – yeah.
And then inbox and approvals is probably the place to look if you didn't have one screen bookmarked, just because that'll give you a clear idea of, like, what's actually needing your attention.
Great.
Thanks.
Cool.
think that's it.
Expect lots of posts, and then we'll iterate as needed.
But I think we'll be able to do a pretty good job just based on what you've said in this call.
Yeah.
And as always, if anything pops up, feel free to just drop a link or a blurb, whatever, in our distribute channel, and we'll keep an eye out.
Okay.
Yeah.
Is it enough for me to just paste the link and say, like, hey, you should post this on our handle?
Yeah.
Yeah.
Yeah.
Rafi can follow up if there's any like, you know, additional questions or anything, but yeah, that generally should be enough.
Cool, for sure.
Cool.
Great.
All right.
Thanks, everyone.
Have a good day.
Thank you.
Have a good day, bye-bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Datagrid's social media strategy and content planning for LinkedIn posts.](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Thiago's personal posts on company building and AI insights perform well, driving engagement and leads](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Video demos of Datagrid's AI agent capabilities are highly effective content](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [The company account should focus on AI-related topics and engage more with employee/customer posts](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2043.0)
  - [Content strategy will emphasize unique use cases, customer stories, and Thiago's insights on AI/business building](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)

## Topics

### Personal LinkedIn Performance

  - [Posts on company building and AI insights perform best](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Generate business leads and customer engagement](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Video demos (e.g. AI agent for construction) get strong engagement (101 reactions, 10k impressions)](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Posts serve multiple purposes: customer awareness, recruitment, VC interest](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)

### Datagrid AI Agent Capabilities

  - [Can work with massive datasets (25GB, 100k+ pages) to find specific information quickly](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [Uses knowledge graphs and semantic retrieval for accurate citations](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Agentic system builds own plan to complete complex tasks across multiple tools](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)
  - [Example use cases: competitive analysis, expense categorization, construction project scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)

### Company LinkedIn Account Strategy

  - [Aim to emulate Clay's engaged social presence (commenting widely on relevant posts)](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
  - [Focus on AI topics, avoid signaling about competitors](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2055.0)
  - [Increase engagement with employee/customer posts about Datagrid](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2214.0)
  - [Develop a light, humorous tone for company account interactions](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2198.0)

### Content Planning Process

  - [Thiago prefers reacting to drafted posts rather than writing initial content](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)
  - [Will quickly approve high-quality, unique ideas aligned with core themes](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2287.0)
  - [Core content themes: building the business, overcoming challenges, AI's impact on work/society](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2329.0)
  - [Aim for substance over high posting volume](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2316.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to draft posts and add directly to content calendar for review](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2412.0)
  - [Kaitlin to add GrowthX team as managers on Datagrid company LinkedIn account](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2274.0)
  - [Develop more video demos and customer use case content](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
  - [Thiago to share relevant links/ideas in Slack for potential posts](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2455.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to refine company account persona after initial posting](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2240.0)

action_items.description: Send video of customer using scheduling workflow to GrowthX team
Draft humorous, engaging comment for Datagrid company account on Miles' recent evals post
Add GrowthX team as managers on Datagrid company LinkedIn account
Ensure multiple LinkedIn post drafts in Assembly calendar for Thiago to review
Move LinkedIn post drafts from ideas to calendar in Assembly
